cases.title: TS-22: GPS within default 100 m radius passes and check-in succeeds when all other rules pass
preconditions: Active session with room GPS (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 100
Authenticated enrolled Student with Pending attendance
Valid unexpired QrToken from GET /sessions/:sessionId/qr/current
Student device coordinates inside radius (10.762700, 106.660200)
TestClock within attendance window; spoofMetadata.mockLocationDetected false
steps: POST /check-in with tokenId, latitude 10.762700, longitude 106.660200 using Student session
Assert HTTP status 200 and outcome Success
Assert attendance.status Present in response
Query check_in_attempts for latest attempt and assert outcome Success
Verify GeoVerificationService radius check passed (distanceMeters ≤ 100) per BR-02
cases.expected: AC-08a satisfied: Haversine distance ≤ session gpsRadiusMeters; radius check passes and flow continues to Present when all other pipeline steps pass

cases.title: TS-23: GPS outside configured radius returns OutOfRadius without Present attendance
preconditions: Active session with room GPS (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 100
Authenticated enrolled Student with Pending attendance
Valid unexpired QrToken
Student coordinates outside radius (~167 m north: 10.764122, 106.660172)
steps: POST /check-in with tokenId, latitude 10.764122, longitude 106.660172 using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400
Assert response outcome OutOfRadius and errorCode OutOfRadius
Assert localized message contains Bạn đang ngoài phạm vi phòng học per API design §6.2
Query attendance_records for studentId and sessionId and assert status remains Pending (not Present)
Query check_in_attempts and assert outcome OutOfRadius with distance_meters logged (no raw lat/lng)
cases.expected: AC-08b satisfied: device outside session radius rejected with OutOfRadius; attendance not set to Present per BR-02

cases.title: TS-24: Missing GPS coordinates on check-in submit returns GpsDisabled
preconditions: Active session with valid room GPS and enrolled authenticated Student
Valid unexpired QrToken
Request body omits latitude/longitude or sends null coordinates (client GPS unavailable per BR-12)
steps: POST /check-in with tokenId only (no latitude/longitude fields) using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400
Assert response outcome GpsDisabled and errorCode GpsDisabled
Assert message Vui lòng bật GPS và cấp quyền định vị để điểm danh per AC-08c
Query attendance_records and assert status remains Pending
Verify check-in pipeline short-circuits at step 11 (before radius check) per validation-rules §5.1
cases.expected: AC-08c server path satisfied: GPS unavailable rejects with GpsDisabled before BR-02 radius evaluation; no Present attendance

cases.title: TS-25: Successful radius-validated check-in does not persist raw latitude/longitude in attendance tables
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database running
Active session, enrolled student, Valid QrToken, Pending attendance
CheckInService.submit callable with in-radius coordinates (10.762700, 106.660200)
steps: Inspect attendance_records schema and confirm no latitude/longitude columns per domain model §4 and database design
Invoke CheckInService.submit with valid tokenId and in-radius coordinates
Assert attendance transitions to Present
Query attendance_records row for sessionId and studentId and assert no raw client coordinates stored
Query check_in_attempts for outcome Success and assert distance_meters populated but no raw lat/lng columns
Verify coordinates discarded after validation per FR-08 and NFR-12
cases.expected: AC-08d satisfied: raw latitude/longitude not stored in long-term attendance tables; only distance_meters on check_in_attempts per GpsNotPersisted integration target

cases.title: GeoVerificationService.verifyLocation computes Haversine distance and withinRadius against session room point
preconditions: GeoVerificationService wired in checkin-qr module per domain model §7.1
Room coordinates (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 100 loaded from Session fixture
ClientGeoMetadata with mockLocationDetected false
steps: Call verifyLocation(roomLat, roomLng, clientLat 10.762700, clientLng 106.660200, radiusMeters 100, metadata)
Assert result.withinRadius true and distanceMeters ≤ 100
Call verifyLocation with outside client coords (10.764122, 106.660172)
Assert result.withinRadius false and distanceMeters > 100
Assert client coordinates exist only in memory during call (not written to DB)
cases.expected: GeoVerificationService enforces BR-02 Haversine ≤ gpsRadiusMeters; module boundary test for GPS radius verification core logic

cases.title: CheckInService GpsNotPersisted: PostgreSQL transaction marks Present without writing client coordinates
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session, enrollment, Valid QrToken, Pending attendance
CheckInService orchestrates GeoVerificationService then serializable transaction per domain model §5.2
steps: Record beforeState: attendance Pending, no Present row with coordinate fields
Invoke CheckInService.submit with in-radius locationPayload (latitude 10.762700, longitude 106.660200)
Query attendance_records and assert afterState Present with checkedInAt set
Assert attendance_records and related long-term tables contain no latitude or longitude values
Query check_in_attempts and assert distance_meters is numeric and spoof_flags present where applicable
cases.expected: Module-integration GpsNotPersisted suite per testing-plan §5: coordinates used for validation only then discarded; AC-08d privacy invariant enforced at DB boundary

cases.title: OutOfRadius rejection leaves Attendance Pending per SM-04 retryable outcomes
preconditions: Pending attendance_records row in PostgreSQL for enrolled student and Active session
Valid QrToken; CheckInService.submit callable with out-of-radius coordinates
steps: Record beforeState Attendance status Pending
Invoke CheckInService.submit with outside-radius coordinates (10.764122, 106.660172)
Assert CheckInAttempt outcome OutOfRadius inserted
Query attendance_records and assert afterState remains Pending (not Present or Absent)
Verify SM-04 per 07-state-machines.md: OutOfRadius allows student retry
cases.expected: beforeState Pending; afterState Pending on OutOfRadius; student may retry after moving within radius per state machine §4.2

cases.title: POST /check-in with in-radius coordinates returns 200 Success envelope
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session cookie set
Active sessionId with Valid QrToken and in-radius coordinates available
steps: Send POST /api/v1/check-in with body { tokenId, latitude: 10.762700, longitude: 106.660200, spoofMetadata: { mockLocationDetected: false, platform: "android" } }
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert Content-Type application/json; charset=utf-8
Assert response outcome Success and attendance.status Present
Assert no errorCode field on success per API design §6.2
cases.expected: HTTP 200 Success contract when GPS within radius and all pipeline steps pass; validates AC-08a happy-path HTTP surface

cases.title: POST /check-in with out-of-radius coordinates returns 400 OutOfRadius envelope
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session
Active session with gpsRadiusMeters 100 and room (10.762622, 106.660172)
Valid unexpired QrToken
Outside coordinates (10.764122, 106.660172)
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId and outside-radius latitude/longitude
Assert HTTP status 400
Assert response body outcome OutOfRadius and errorCode OutOfRadius
Assert message field contains Vietnamese out-of-radius guidance per §6.3 mapping
Assert no attendance Present in response body
cases.expected: HTTP 400 OutOfRadius per API design §6.3 and error-handling §4; canonical failure envelope for AC-08b

cases.title: POST /check-in without coordinates returns 400 GpsDisabled envelope
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session
Active session with Valid QrToken
Request body missing latitude and longitude (simulates client GPS disabled)
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with body { tokenId } only (no latitude/longitude)
Assert HTTP status 400
Assert response outcome GpsDisabled and errorCode GpsDisabled
Assert message Vui lòng bật GPS và cấp quyền định vị để điểm danh
cases.expected: HTTP 400 GpsDisabled per API design §6.3; BR-12 enforced before radius check

cases.title: Session gpsRadiusMeters override 200 m accepts student at ~167 m from room point
preconditions: Active session with room (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 200 (instructor override per FR-04)
Authenticated enrolled Student with coordinates (10.764122, 106.660172) ~167 m from room
Valid unexpired QrToken; all non-GPS pipeline checks pass
steps: POST /check-in with tokenId and coordinates (10.764122, 106.660172)
Assert HTTP status 200 outcome Success (would fail with default 100 m radius)
Assert attendance Present
Verify distance ~167 m ≤ 200 m override radius
cases.expected: AC-08a session override radius honored: distance ≤ configured gpsRadiusMeters (not only default 100 m) per BR-02 and validation-rules §3.4

cases.title: GPS at Haversine boundary distance equal to gpsRadiusMeters passes radius check
preconditions: Active session with room (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 100
Client coordinates at ~100 m from room point (10.763520, 106.660172) per geo fixture math
Authenticated enrolled Student, Valid QrToken, Pending attendance
steps: POST /check-in with boundary coordinates (10.763520, 106.660172)
Assert HTTP status 200 outcome Success
Assert distanceMeters on check_in_attempts ≤ 100 (inclusive boundary per HaversineDistance unit tests)
Contrast: coordinates at 10.764122 (~167 m) with same session assert 400 OutOfRadius
cases.expected: BR-02 uses ≤ comparison; student at exactly radius boundary passes; just outside fails — boundary invariant for geo verification

cases.title: Flow B step 5: Student C outside radius receives OutOfRadius in anti-fraud rejection path
preconditions: Flow B steps 1–4 complete: Active session, Student A checked in, Student A duplicate rejected
Student B same-token rejection already exercised
Student C authenticated and enrolled with outside-radius coordinates (10.764122, 106.660172)
Fresh Valid QrToken issued for Student C
steps: POST /check-in as Student C with outside-radius coordinates and fresh tokenId
Assert HTTP 400 outcome OutOfRadius
Assert Student C attendance remains Pending
Verify Flow B anti-fraud path includes GPS rejection per testing-plan §6 Flow B
cases.expected: Flow B step 5 validates AC-08b alongside AC-09 anti-fraud scenarios; OutOfRadius without Present

cases.title: Instructor denied POST /check-in with GPS payload (lacks checkin:submit)
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session available
Active session with valid room GPS and QrToken
Instructor role lacks checkin:submit per roles-permissions §2.2
steps: POST /check-in with valid tokenId and in-radius coordinates using Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
Verify no GPS radius evaluation creates Present attendance for instructor userId
Assert permission guard runs before Layer 4 domain GPS checks
cases.expected: GPS verification endpoint restricted to Student role; Instructor cannot submit coordinates for check-in per RBAC matrix

cases.title: Mobile check-in journey: GPS permission granted and in-radius coordinates enable successful submit
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport 375×812 (iOS Safari or Android Chrome)
Active session check-in deep link /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
Browser geolocation granted with in-radius mock coordinates (10.762700, 106.660200)
steps: Navigate to check-in page on mobile viewport
Verify GPS capture indicator shows coordinates acquired
Tap submit control (Xác nhận điểm danh)
Verify success panel with Present status after radius validation passes
Verify no raw GPS coordinates displayed in UI beyond transient capture state
cases.expected: AC-08a mobile web path: client captures GPS, server validates radius, success confirmation shown per user-flows §WF-03

cases.title: Mobile check-in OutOfRadius outcome panel shows Vietnamese message and retry guidance
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport with GPS permission granted
Active session check-in deep link with valid token
Browser geolocation mocked to outside-radius coordinates (10.764122, 106.660172)
steps: Navigate to /check-in page and wait for GPS capture with outside coordinates
Submit check-in
Verify outcome panel displays OutOfRadius state with message Bạn đang ngoài phạm vi phòng học
Verify distance hint or move-closer guidance visible per user-flows §3
Verify no Present success badge; student can retry after moving closer
cases.expected: AC-08b surfaced in mobile UI with localized OutOfRadius outcome and recovery action per ui-states and user-flows §3

cases.title: GPS permission denied shows GpsDisabled UX with help link without API call within 15 s timeout
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport 375×812
Active session check-in deep link with valid token
Browser geolocation permission denied or GPS disabled in device settings
Playwright geolocation permission set to denied
steps: Navigate to /check-in page
Wait up to 15 seconds for geolocation timeout per validation-rules §6
Verify GpsDisabled outcome panel displays Vui lòng bật GPS và cấp quyền định vị để điểm danh
Verify Hướng dẫn cấp quyền or PermissionGuideModal link to device settings per AC-08c
Assert no POST /check-in network request sent while GPS unavailable (client-side gate)
After granting permission and in-radius coords, verify student can retry successfully
cases.expected: AC-08c client path: permission denied or 15 s timeout shows GpsDisabled Vietnamese message with help link; no server call until coordinates available per NFR-19

cases.title: check_in_attempts stores distance_meters but never raw client latitude/longitude after radius validation
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL; successful check-in transaction completed via CheckInService
check_in_attempts table schema per database design §checkin-qr
steps: Complete successful check-in with in-radius coordinates via integration harness
SELECT columns from check_in_attempts for the attempt row
Assert distance_meters is NOT NULL and within expected range
Assert no latitude or longitude columns exist or are populated on check_in_attempts or attendance_records
Verify privacy baseline NFR-12: coordinates used only in request handler memory
cases.expected: AC-08d and NFR-12 enforced at persistence layer: distance logged for audit without long-term coordinate storage
